Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1200 "OUTONALIMB-CFE0-1200" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $cfe0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Out on a Limb.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $CFE0 which copies 512 bytes of data from $D000 down to $0100 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $1200 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
